query:
-- Overall enrichment status breakdown
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'not_found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as notFound,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasEmail,
  SUM(CASE WHEN linkedin IS NOT NULL AND linkedin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasLinkedin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasPhone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN verificationStatus = 'verified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as verified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN verificationStatus = 'ai_suggested' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as aiSuggested
FROM contacts;

-- Enrichment by source
SELECT enrichmentSource, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM contacts 
WHERE enrichmentStatus = 'enriched'
GROUP BY enrichmentSource;

-- Apollo credits used across all pipeline runs
SELECT SUM(apolloCreditsUsed) as totalApolloCredits, SUM(contactsEnriched) as totalContactsEnriched
FROM pipelineRuns WHERE status = 'completed';
